dev.template: Start the development servers for both frontend and backend using npm run dev from the project root.

db-up.template: Start the PostgreSQL database using Docker with npm run db:up. The database runs on port 5434.

db-down.template: Stop the PostgreSQL database with npm run db:down.

db-logs.template: View PostgreSQL logs using npm run db:logs.

db-reset.template: Reset the database by deleting volumes and recreating with npm run db:reset.

db-migrate.template: Run database migrations from the backend directory using npm run db:migrate.

db-rollback.template: Rollback the last database migration from the backend directory using npm run db:rollback.

db-seed.template: Run database seeds from the backend directory using npm run db:seed.

test.template: Run tests for the project. Check the AGENTS.md for specific test commands per workspace.

test-backend.template: Run tests from the backend workspace. Use npm run test from the backend/ directory.

test-cov.template: Run tests with coverage report from the backend directory using npm run test:cov.

lint.template: Run linting on the backend workspace using npm --workspace backend run lint.

lint-frontend.template: Run linting on the frontend workspace using npm --workspace frontend run lint.

build-backend.template: Build the backend for production from the backend/ directory using npm run build.

backend-dev.template: Start the backend in development watch mode from the backend/ directory using npm run start:dev.

precommit.template:
Run lint commands for both backend and frontend, then build backend:
npm --workspace backend run lint
npm --workspace frontend run lint
npm --workspace backend run build

migrate-make.template: Create a new database migration. Run: npm run db:migrate:make -- name from the backend/ directory. Creates migration file in backend/src/database/migrations/.
